to - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
The name of the destination city.

toString() - Method in class com.transportapp.model.Station

trainStation - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Station
The name or identifier of the train station.
TransportData - Class in com.transportapp.model
Represents the transport data for a country including its map, stations, and departures.
TransportData() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
 
TransportDataGenerator - Class in com.transportapp.generator
A class responsible for generating transport data including the map of cities, transport stations, and departures.
TransportDataGenerator(int, int) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
Constructs a TransportDataGenerator for a country map of size X by Y.
type - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
The type of transport ("bus" or "train").
